release_name: Period Analytics + RiskCommand + PC Governance Full
acceptance_scenarios: OperationSnapshot is generated from operations facts and lenses
Expense missing or not integrated is not displayed as zero
Every RiskCommand risk item has drilldown refs
go_criteria: PeriodAnalytics, RiskCommand, and PCGovernance support shadow, pilot, active, and rollback routing
Rollback disables feature flags or runtime modes without deleting closed snapshots or audit history
Compensation uses LateAdjustment, correction note, or risk item regeneration
no_go_criteria: P0: Period accepts user-filled income, deposit, or refund facts
P0: missing expense is displayed as zero
P0: Risk number cannot drill down
P0: shadow event enters official projector
P0: GateResult is not machine generated
P1: PC Governance admin permissions are incomplete
P1: Release Control Center is not visible
P2: risk label copy is incomplete
P2: PC table columns are incomplete without fact impact
known_risks: MR-10 uses skeleton shadow compare until production shadow rows exist
MR-06 and MR-07 release reports remain missing in the repository state and should be recovered before active rollout
ExpenseLedger policy hardening remains a dependency before verified profit metrics
